since_last: 52% of 86 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +2.00%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 52% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.92% · BTC -2.35% · Gold -0.74% · Nasdaq100 -2.59%. 52% of 86 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +2.00%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +2.00%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -6.20%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -10.85%
cards.body: Leaders: SPCX +6.37%, IBM +5.42%, NET +4.98%, NOW +4.61%, CHKP +3.74%. Laggards: MU -10.85%, VRT -9.61%, ARM -8.88%, LRCX -8.88%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +6.37% at $164.45
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +6.37% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
